description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring multiple rectangular solar panels mounted on a flat, platform-like base. The panels are arranged in a staggered, non-uniform configuration, with some panels tilted at an angle and others lying flat. The base appears to be constructed from a grid-patterned material, possibly metal or reinforced plastic, and includes several raised sections and blocky structures that may serve as supports or housings for electrical components. The overall structure is low-profile and expansive, suggesting it is designed for rooftop or ground-level deployment in an urban environment. The color palette is primarily black, gray, and blue, with the blue areas likely representing reflective or glass surfaces of the solar panels. There are no visible electrical inverters or cabling, and the mounting structure appears fixed and robust.
description: A low-profile solar energy installation with multiple black and blue panels on a grid-patterned base, featuring staggered, tilted, and flat panel arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main solar panels in the foreground, both tilted, with additional panels and blocky support structures visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the varying tilt angles of the solar panels and the elongated, flat base with multiple raised supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the panels and the blocky structures, with the grid-patterned base extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staggered arrangement of the panels and the distribution of support structures across the base.
attribute_panel_orientation: Panels are mostly tilted at approximately 30-40 degrees, with some flat; orientation appears fixed and not adjustable.
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with robust blocky supports, likely aluminum or steel frame.
attribute_array_configuration: Clustered arrangement of 4 main panels, staggered and not in a strict grid or row.
